# Mango Software

> AI-powered software development consultancy led by Derek Kaneshiro, a software engineer with 25+ years of enterprise experience.

## About

Mango Software helps companies navigate AI transformation in software development. We combine deep enterprise experience with cutting-edge AI-powered development workflows to deliver production-grade platforms at startup speed.

## Services

### AI Strategy & Roadmapping
Assess AI readiness, identify high-impact opportunities, and create actionable roadmaps for AI transformation. Navigate the shift from traditional development to AI-first workflows.

### AI-Powered Development
Build production-grade products using AI as the primary developer. Claude, Copilot, and custom workflows enable faster delivery, lower costs, and enterprise-quality architecture.

### R&D & Prototyping
Rapid prototypes and proof of concepts to validate ideas before full investment. From blockchain to healthcare, test complex technical concepts with minimal risk.

## Expertise

- **Frontend**: Flutter, Nuxt 3, Vue 3, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: NestJS, .NET, PostgreSQL, Firebase, Redis
- **Blockchain**: Sui Move, Solidity, Solana
- **AI & Cloud**: Claude, GenKit, GCP, Azure, BigQuery

## Recent Projects

### BlueSkil
Apprenticeship marketplace for skilled trades. Connects verified employers with apprentices in construction. Full hiring lifecycle with Stripe payments and analytics.

### Redy
Digital vault and EU Digital Product Passport platform. Consumer app for receipts/warranties, B2B platform for 2027 EU DPP compliance.

### Toknize
Blockchain-agnostic tokenization platform. One API to tokenize anything on Sui, EVM, or Solana chains.
